case_name: 동아일보 에듀투어 패키지 연계 (해외 체험 + 국내 사전 워크숍)

critique: specificity: Overseas STEM venue details were generic ('visit Google'). Need specific program types, booking procedures, and lead times for each institution.
financial_rigor: Budget lacked per-destination cost variance. Tokyo vs Silicon Valley trip costs differ by 50%+ but were lumped together. Need destination-specific P&L.
risk_coverage: Missing visa risk detail (ESTA vs Schengen processing times), no cancellation/refund policy, no mention of travel advisory monitoring.
actionability: No per-trip timeline template. The 6-month planning cycle was described conceptually but not operationalized with specific T-minus milestones.
revisions_applied: Added detailed venue partnership table with specific contact methods and lead times per institution (logistics.md Section 2.1)
Added destination-specific travel cost ranges in budget.md (Tokyo ₩2.0-2.5M vs SV ₩3.0-3.5M)
Added visa requirement table with processing times and risk levels (logistics.md Section 1.2)
Added Per-Trip Timeline Template with T-minus milestones (timeline.md Section 3)
Added travel advisory monitoring to emergency protocols (logistics.md Section 4.4)

critique: actionability: Partner brief lacked a concrete pilot proposal (specific destination, date, price). The '6.2 여행사 선정 요건' was criteria without named candidates. Need a 'Tokyo Edition' example package that could be presented in a meeting.
revisions_applied: Added Section 4 to partner-brief.md: concrete pilot package proposal ('동아일보 AI STEM 에듀투어 — Tokyo Edition') with specific dates, pricing, and role assignments
Added Section 6.3 to partner-brief.md: named travel agency candidates (하나투어, 모두투어, 전문교육여행사) with strengths
Added pricing elasticity scenario table to budget.md (Section 6.2) with recommendation to start at ₩750K for pilot
Added critical path dependency diagram to timeline.md

critique: All axes at 7 or above. Remaining improvement opportunities are incremental: financial_rigor could benefit from sensitivity analysis on exchange rate fluctuations for overseas costs, and actionability could add a RACI matrix for the 3-party partnership. These are enhancements, not gaps.
The honest treatment of the 동아 에듀투어 uncertainty (Scenario A/B throughout all documents) is the strongest aspect of this case — it demonstrates intellectual honesty and practical flexibility.
The seasonal constraint (school breaks only) is properly acknowledged as a structural limitation rather than hidden — appropriate for a Priority 3 case.
revisions_applied: Minor: Added ROI calculation to partner-brief.md Section 3.3 (2,550-4,120% ROI) to strengthen the pitch
Minor: Added 'Seasonal Constraints & Capacity' summary table to timeline.md
No structural changes needed — all axes above threshold
